case_title: MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP. VS. MAY N. NG et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP. SERVED JUL-23-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NG, MAY N.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $265.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT NG, MAY N.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NG, MAY N. $6,611.14 PRINCIPAL, $648.43 INTEREST, $265.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,524.57, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
